prompt: Explain which Vite modules own config resolution, dev-server construction, transform middleware, module transformation, plugin hook execution, and module graph state.

expected_symbols.name: resolveConfig
expected_symbols.why: Owns merged config resolution and defaults.

expected_symbols.name: createPluginContainer
expected_symbols.why: Owns construction of the plugin hook execution container.

expected_symbols.name: ModuleGraph
expected_symbols.why: Owns module graph state and transform result tracking.

expected_claims.text: Config resolution is owned by src/node/config.ts through resolveConfig.
Dev-server construction is owned by src/node/server/index.ts through createServer.
Request-time transform routing is owned by the transform middleware.
Module transformation orchestration is owned by transformRequest.
Plugin hook execution and module graph state are separate ownership areas.

forbidden_claims.text: The module graph owns config resolution defaults.
Dev-server module transforms are owned by the production build entry point.
